subcodes.first_line: The highest praise is due to them who have immersed themselves in the ocean of detachment—they who in the darkness of these times...Give a hearing ear, O people, to that which I, in truth, say unto you. The one true God, exalted be His glory, hath ever regarded
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا متغمسین بحر تجرید را لایق و سزا که در ظلمت ایام و اعتساف انام
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
